summary: Completed frontend testing of the contemporary filter styling update across Leads, Accounts, and Account Performance pages. All filter components display correctly with rounded-xl corners, uppercase tracking labels, and proper hover states. Calendar component verified with rounded-lg day cells and modern color scheme.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter styling update has been verified. FilterContainer, FilterItem, FilterGrid components from filter-bar.jsx are used across pages. Calendar component from calendar.jsx has rounded-lg days. MultiSelect has rounded-xl styling with Select All/Clear Selection options.

Leads Page (/leads) Filters.details: 7 filters present with FilterContainer. Labels have uppercase text-xs and tracking-wider classes. All filter dropdowns use rounded-xl SelectTriggers. Time Period, Territory, State, City, Status (MultiSelect), Sales Resource (MultiSelect), and Search input all working correctly.

Accounts Page (/accounts) Filters.details: 5 filters present: Search, Territory, State, City, Account Type. All use FilterContainer component with rounded-xl dropdowns. Uppercase tracking labels working. State/City disabled until Territory selected.

Account Performance Page (/account-perfo.details: 5 filters present: Time Period, Territory, State, City, Account Type. All dropdowns have rounded-xl corners. Active filter count badge displays correctly.

Filter Container Header.details: Filter icon in rounded-lg container. 'X active' badge shows count when filters applied. Reset button appears when filters are active and clears all filters correctly.

MultiSelect Component.details: Status and Sales Resource filters use MultiSelect with rounded-xl styling. Select All/Deselect All option present. Clear Selection button at bottom. Checkboxes with rounded styling.

Select Dropdown Styling.details: SelectContent dropdowns have rounded-xl corners. SelectItems have rounded-lg styling. Hover states working with slate/primary colors.

Calendar Component.details: Verified on Follow-ups page. Day cells have rounded-lg class. Selected date shows bg-primary with shadow-sm. Today's date highlighted with blue background. Hover states show bg-primary/10.

Search Input Styling.details: Search inputs across pages have rounded-xl class with pl-10 for icon. Proper hover and focus states with border transitions.
